'''鈭歡-g-n''' ('''kagagan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neckspring|neckspring]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neckspring|neckspring]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| kagagan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigagan|thigagan]] || [[word:jigagan|jigagan]] || [[word:shigagan|shigagan]] || [[word:kigagan|kigagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugagan|thuthugagan]] || [[word:jujugagan|jujugagan]] || [[word:shushugagan|shushugagan]] || [[word:kukugagan|kukugagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugagan|thugagan]] || [[word:jugagan|jugagan]] || [[word:shugagan|shugagan]] || [[word:kugagan|kugagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugagan|thugagan]] || [[word:jugagan|jugagan]] || [[word:shugagan|shugagan]] || [[word:kugagan|kugagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegagan|thegagan]] || [[word:jegagan|jegagan]] || [[word:shegagan|shegagan]] || [[word:kegagan|kegagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogagan|thothogagan]] || [[word:jojogagan|jojogagan]] || [[word:shoshogagan|shoshogagan]] || [[word:kokogagan|kokogagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogagan|thogagan]] || [[word:jogagan|jogagan]] || [[word:shogagan|shogagan]] || [[word:kogagan|kogagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogagan|thogagan]] || [[word:jogagan|jogagan]] || [[word:shogagan|shogagan]] || [[word:kogagan|kogagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]] || [[word:gagan|gagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gagan|th忙gagan]] || [[word:j忙gagan|j忙gagan]] || [[word:sh忙gagan|sh忙gagan]] || [[word:k忙gagan|k忙gagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagagan|thathagagan]] || [[word:jajagagan|jajagagan]] || [[word:shashagagan|shashagagan]] || [[word:kakagagan|kakagagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagagan|thagagan]] || [[word:jagagan|jagagan]] || [[word:shagagan|shagagan]] || [[word:kagagan|kagagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagagan|thagagan]] || [[word:jagagan|jagagan]] || [[word:shagagan|shagagan]] || [[word:kagagan|kagagan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagagan|shagagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagagan|goshagagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagagan|gokishagagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagagann眉|shagagann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagagannkn眉|goshagagannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagann眉|gokishagagann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagagansh毛|shagagansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagagannksh毛|goshagagannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagagansh毛|gokishagagansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagaganro|shagaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagannkro|goshagagannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagaganro|gokishagaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagaganmu|shagaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagannkmu|goshagagannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagaganmu|gokishagaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagagansher|shagagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagagannksher|goshagagannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagagansher|gokishagagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagaganng|shagaganng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagagannkng|goshagagannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagaganng|gokishagaganng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagaganya|shagaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagagannkya|goshagagannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagaganya|gokishagaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagaganyam|shagaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagagannkyam|goshagagannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagaganyam|gokishagaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagann眉sh毛|shagagann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagannkn眉sh毛|goshagagannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagann眉sh毛|gokishagagann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagann眉ro|shagagann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagannkn眉ro|goshagagannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagann眉ro|gokishagagann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagann眉mu|shagagann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagannkn眉mu|goshagagannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagann眉mu|gokishagagann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagansh毛n眉|shagagansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagannksh毛n眉|goshagagannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagansh毛n眉|gokishagagansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagansh毛ro|shagagansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagannksh毛ro|goshagagannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagansh毛ro|gokishagagansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagansh毛mu|shagagansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagannksh毛mu|goshagagannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagansh毛mu|gokishagagansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagaganron眉|shagaganron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagannkron眉|goshagagannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagaganron眉|gokishagaganron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagaganrosh毛|shagaganrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagannkrosh毛|goshagagannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagaganrosh毛|gokishagaganrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagaganromu|shagaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagannkromu|goshagagannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagaganromu|gokishagaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagaganmun眉|shagaganmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagannkmun眉|goshagagannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagaganmun眉|gokishagaganmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagaganmush毛|shagaganmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagannkmush毛|goshagagannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagaganmush毛|gokishagaganmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagaganmuro|shagaganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagannkmuro|goshagagannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagaganmuro|gokishagaganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
